safest_plan.entry_basis: Chart 0.886-fib / order-block zone drawn at ~0.032 (labelled '0.032$' + '0.886') — the nearest pullback buy zone below current price. The text's original 0.0270–0.0300 entry is now stale: price has already run up to 0.0419.

targets.basis: zero_live grade 2025-05-12: 0.047–0.051 daily + 6-day supply zone (midpoint used)
zero_live grade 2025-05-12: 0.25+ longer-term bonus target if momentum holds

safest_plan.stop_basis: zero_live: close below 0.0270; this also sits under the 'Classic OB' demand zone (~0.026) drawn on the chart, with a deeper rebalance zone near 0.024 (estimated from chart)

stance_by_source.summary: Daily setup buying a pullback into the early-Feb demand/imbalance zone, targeting the 0.047–0.051 supply with a stretch 0.25 bonus; graded a 7/10 partial (educational, not advice).

conflicts: The text entry (0.0270–0.0300) is stale versus the chart: live price is ~0.0419, having already rallied off those lows and broken structure to the upside, so the planned entry no longer exists — buying now would be chasing into the first target rather than entering the setup.
plain_english: Only one source covers this coin (a Zero teaching session from May 2025), and it was bullish — buy a dip near 0.027–0.030, aim for roughly 0.047–0.051. The problem is the price has already jumped to about 0.042, so that cheap entry is gone and chasing here means buying right as it approaches the target, which is poor risk. Wait: either for a pullback into the lower buy zones drawn on the chart (around 0.032, or deeper near 0.026), or for a fresh signal — do not buy at the current price.
